FENOGLIDE is indicated as adjunctive therapy to diet:
• to reduce triglyceride (TG) levels in adults with severe hypertriglyceridemia (TG greater than or equal to
500 mg/dL).
• to reduce elevated low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C) in adults with primary hyperlipidemia
